data.title: Law firm Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for CTO Realty investors from Feb 18, 2021 to June 24, 2025. Contact for losses options.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced losses in CTO to reach out to him for a consultation about next steps. If you bought or obtained securities in CTO during the period from February 18, 2021, to June 24, 2025, and want to explore your options and potential remedies, please contact Wilson.

data.title: "The Plug" raises $5 million in funding to expand retail presence, keeps round open for more investors.
data.description: In Los Angeles on October 3, 2025, The Plug Drink, a prominent plant-based liver health supplement brand, disclosed the successful accumulation of $5 million through a combination of equity and debt funding. This achievement marks a significant milestone for The Plug as it prepares to advance into its next phase of growth. The company's recent Venture Round has unfolded over the course of the last 14...

data.title: Samsung is collaborating with Coinbase to introduce crypto to 75M Galaxy users in the US, with a worldwide launch in the pipeline.
data.description: Samsung Wallet has partnered with Coinbase to facilitate greater access to cryptocurrency for a significant user base of 75 million Galaxy users in the US. The collaboration intends to simplify the process of engaging with digital assets for these users. Additionally, there are plans for a worldwide release in the coming time, signaling a broader reach for this initiative beyond the US market.

data.title: Viktoria Mortensen launches Face Plasticity Rejuvenation Challenge as safer anti-aging alternative New York Oct. 3, 2025.
data.description: Based on tensegrity and osteopathic studies, a new program is providing an alternative to fillers, toxins, and surgeries for professionals and wellness clients. The initiative, launched in New York on Oct. 3, 2025, addresses the increasing demand for non-invasive procedures in the aesthetics sector worldwide.

data.title: Investors in Altimmune urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for losses between 08/10/23 - 06/25/25. Contact James Wilson for options.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced losses in Altimmune to reach out to him directly to explore potential courses of action. If you bought or obtained securities in Altimmune during the period from August 10, 2023, to June 25, 2025, and wish to discuss your options, please contact Mr. Wilson.

KALSHI PREDICTS 15-DAY SHUTDOWN Day 3 of the U.S. government shutdown. For the first time, forecasts hit 15 days — the longest outlook yet — as traders bet on a drawn-out standoff. Kalshi odds have climbed steadily since late September, with no settlement in sight.

data.title: Armor Health appoints JC Rogers as VP Business Development to drive national growth. MIAMI, Oct. 3, 2025.
data.description: In Miami on October 3, 2025, Armor Health, a prominent national integrated correctional healthcare provider, introduced JC Rogers as their new Vice President of Business Development. With this appointment, JC will spearhead Armor's sales strategy and growth initiatives. Armor Health, known for its quality services, can be found at ArmorHealthcare.com.
